title: Injection scan record and two-pass reconciliation (P62)
description: Data contract (NOT an agent output schema; exempt from invariant 15). Formalizes the offline pattern-tier scan record shape defined prose+example in shared/injection-guard-engine.md, and the two-pass reconciliation triple written into the inbox ledger by tools/handoff/inbox.py::approve. The session verdict is authoritative; the offline verdict is an advisory prior and can never un-seal a file the offline tier sealed (SEAL-TERMINAL).

offline_pattern_scan.description: The offline (pass 1) advisory result. Carries NO raw content, so it can be embedded in a session prompt as data without smuggling an injection.

reconciliation.description: How the authoritative in-session verdict related to the offline prior.

agreed.description: did the session match the prior's flagged/clean direction? null when pass 2 has not run

session_action.description: escalated = the session found injection the pattern tier missed (the primary value)

effective.description: the authoritative verdict: the session verdict when present, else the offline level

injection_review.description: The two-pass triple persisted in the inbox ledger on an approved record.

injection_scan_result.description: the authoritative in-session (pass 2) verdict; null when pass 2 has not run
